title: Oil prices slide as Trump warns Iran to open Strait of Hormuz by Tuesday or face 'hell'
summary_full: President Donald Trump warned Sunday in an expletive-filled social media post that Iran would be "living in Hell" if they do not open the Strait by Tuesday.
summary_public: President Donald Trump warned Sunday in an expletive-filled social media post that Iran would be "living in Hell" if they do not open the Strait by Tuesday.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump warns Iran to open Strait of Hormuz by Tuesday or face 'hell'
